scripts.test: if [ -f web/package.json ]; then pnpm --dir web test; else echo 'web/package.json not found; skipping frontend tests'; fi
scripts.lint: if [ -f web/package.json ]; then pnpm --dir web lint; else echo 'web/package.json not found; skipping frontend lint'; fi
scripts.typecheck: if [ -f web/package.json ]; then pnpm --dir web typecheck; else echo 'web/package.json not found; skipping frontend typecheck'; fi
scripts.verify: pnpm run test && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck
